Customers and experts recommend FreshBooks

PCMag.com
The
features
you need. All in one place.
Invoicing
Create professional invoices in minutes. Automatically add tracked time and expenses, calculate taxes, and customize your payment options.
Learn about Invoicing
Billing and Payments
Make getting paid the easy part: Get paid faster with automated invoices and billing, secure online payments, and built-in reminders so cash flow stays predictable, all without the chase.
Learn about Billing and Payments
Expenses
Keep track of your expenses with mobile receipt scanning, bank account imports, and automated expense categorization.
Learn about Expenses
Payroll
The simplest way to pay yourself and your team. Seamlessly run payroll, track expenses, and calculate taxes without juggling separate tools.
Learn about Payroll

Keep your books in check, your clients happy, and your work on track. Invest in accounting software that respects your time so you can spend it on building your business, not crunching numbers.

Save time (and money!) by using FreshBooks to collaborate with your team while handling accounting, billing, and payroll.

4.5 Outstanding
FreshBooks offers a well-rounded, intuitive, and attractive double-entry accounting experience. It anticipates the needs of freelancers and small businesses well—better than competitors in this class.
4.5 Excellent
FreshBooks automates daily accounting activities namely invoice creation, payment acceptance, expenses tracking, billable time tracking, and financial reporting.
4.5 Excellent
FreshBooks is an online accounting and invoicing service that saves you time and makes you look professional – Fortune 500 professional.
4.7 Excellent
FreshBooks makes it easy to stay organized, keep track of payments owed and expenses made, send invoices and accept payments.
Award winning support
Our support staff is with you every step of the way, starting the moment you make the switch from spreadsheets or any other accounting software.
100% safe and secure
FreshBooks protects your personal info and your client’s info with industry-standard SSL and encryption so everything is always safe and secure.
Satisfaction guarantee
Buy a plan or sign up for a free trial. FreshBooks promises that if you aren’t satisfied you can contact us anytime within the first 30 days after your purchase for a full refund.
Frequently Asked Questions
How does the 30-day free trial work?
What happens after my free trial?
Do I need to install any software?
Is my data safe?
What if I need help getting started?
How do client limits work in FreshBooks pricing?
Is FreshBooks just an accounting solution or will it help me fill out my tax return?
If I connected my bank account to FreshBooks, how do I know my data’s safe?
What’s is double-entry accounting?
How much does FreshBooks charge per transaction?
What are FreshBooks’ specialized features?
Can FreshBooks replace QuickBooks Online or Xero?

Contact Us

FreshBooks Support
👋 How Can We Help?
Top Categories
Changes and Updates
Find out what's new and improved in FreshBooks.
What Clients View
For clients - learn how to pay invoices with online payments, how to save invoices, estimates, and more.
Dashboard, Account, and Settings
Get started here, or review billing, compliances, and account settings.
Invoices
Make invoices, recurring templates and retainers. Add a deposit, payment schedule, and more.
Payments
Accept online payments from your clients using FreshBooks Payments, PayPal, or Stripe. Track other income, create Checkout Links, and more.
Expenses and Bank Connections
Log expenses and import expenses from your bank account automatically.
Projects and Time Tracking
Track time and Project Profitability, as well as collaborate with your team on projects.
Reports and Accounting
Monitor your business’ health and organize your finances with bank reconciliation.
More Categories

analysis.name: FreshBooks
analysis.value_proposition: All-in-one small business accounting, invoicing, and payments software with award-winning customer support.
analysis.ideal_customer: Freelancers, solopreneurs, and small businesses with employees or contractors who need integrated invoicing, accounting, and payments.

features.name: invoicing
features.description: Create professional customizable invoices with tracked time, expenses, and taxes.
features.evidence_quote: Create professional invoices in minutes. Automatically add tracked time and expenses, calculate taxes

features.name: recurring invoices
features.description: Automated recurring invoice templates.

features.name: scheduled late fees
features.description: Automatically apply late fees to overdue invoices.

features.name: automated late payment reminders
features.description: Automated reminders to clients for unpaid invoices.

features.name: billing and payments
features.description: Automated billing, secure online payments, and built-in reminders.
features.evidence_quote: Get paid faster with automated invoices and billing, secure online payments, and built-in reminders

features.name: online card payments
features.description: Accept credit and debit card payments online.
features.evidence_quote: Online Card and Digital Wallet Payments

features.name: digital wallet payments
features.description: Accept Apple Pay and Google Pay payments.

features.name: ach bank transfers
features.description: Accept ACH bank transfer payments online.

features.name: buy now pay later
features.description: Offer Affirm and Afterpay Buy Now, Pay Later payment options.
features.evidence_quote: Buy Now Pay Later with Affirm ... Buy Now, Pay Later with Afterpay

features.name: checkout links
features.description: Get paid via checkout links without needing an invoice.
features.evidence_quote: Checkout Links Get You Paid Without Invoicing

features.name: in-person card payments
features.description: Accept credit card payments in person or over the phone.
features.evidence_quote: Securely Accept Credit Card Payments in Person or Over the Phone

features.name: secure card storage
features.description: Securely store client credit cards for repeat billing.

features.name: charge client credit cards
features.description: Charge stored client credit cards on demand.

features.name: accept deposits
features.description: Request deposits on invoices before work begins.

features.name: lower credit card transaction fees
features.description: Select tier includes lower credit card processing fees.
features.evidence_quote: Access lower credit card transaction fees and capped bank transfer (ACH) fees

features.name: expense tracking
features.description: Track expenses via mobile receipt scanning, bank imports, and auto-categorization.
features.evidence_quote: Keep track of your expenses with mobile receipt scanning, bank account imports, and automated expense categorization

features.name: expense receipt scanning
features.description: Scan receipts and auto-capture expense data.

features.name: bill receipt scanning
features.description: Scan bills and capture line items automatically.
features.evidence_quote: Bill receipt scanning with the ability to add line items

features.name: automatic bill line item capture
features.description: Automatic multi-line item extraction from bills (Select tier).
features.evidence_quote: Bill receipt scanning with automatic capture of multi-line items

features.name: automated bank import
features.description: Import bank transactions automatically.

features.name: email receipts
features.description: Forward receipts by email directly to your account.
features.evidence_quote: Email Receipts Right to Your Account

features.name: mobile mileage tracking
features.description: Track business mileage from the mobile app.

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Unlimited time tracking across projects.

features.name: project management
features.description: Manage projects with team collaboration and profitability tracking.
features.evidence_quote: Track time and Project Profitability, as well as collaborate with your team on projects

features.name: project budgeting
features.description: Manage budget and billing for projects.
features.evidence_quote: Manage Budget and Billing for Projects

features.name: project profitability
features.description: See profitability metrics for each project.

features.name: estimates
features.description: Create and send unlimited estimates to clients.

features.name: e-signatures
features.description: Accept e-signatures on estimates and proposals.

features.name: proposals
features.description: Create unlimited client proposals.

features.name: client retainers
features.description: Set up retainer billing arrangements for clients.

features.name: client portal
features.description: Client-facing account portal for invoices and payments.

features.name: client profiles
features.description: Store client profiles and account statements.

features.name: client credits
features.description: Track and apply account credits for clients.

features.name: customized email templates
features.description: Customize email templates and signatures sent to clients.

features.name: automated client emails
features.description: Automated client emails with dynamic fields.
features.evidence_quote: Automated Client Emails with Dynamic Fields

features.name: white-label branding
features.description: Remove FreshBooks branding from client emails.
features.evidence_quote: Remove FreshBooks Branding from Client Emails

features.name: double-entry accounting
features.description: Full double-entry accounting reports.

features.name: bank reconciliation
features.description: Reconcile bank statements against ledger.

features.name: accounts payable
features.description: Track and pay bills owed to vendors.

features.name: financial reports
features.description: Run financial and accounting reports.

features.name: tax reports
features.description: Generate tax-time reports.

features.name: business health reports
features.description: Reports summarizing overall business health.

features.name: performance dashboards
features.description: At-a-glance performance dashboards.

features.name: instant payouts
features.description: Access funds instantly from processed payments.

features.name: accountant access
features.description: Grant your accountant access to your books.

features.name: payroll
features.description: Run payroll integrated with expenses and tax calculations.
features.evidence_quote: The simplest way to pay yourself and your team. Seamlessly run payroll, track expenses, and calculate taxes

features.name: team management
features.description: Team member accounts and collaboration.

features.name: team member accounts included
features.description: Select tier includes 2 team member accounts at no extra charge.

differentiators: Award-winning in-house customer support with 4.8/5.0 across 120,000+ reviews
Support team never transfers you to other departments
30M+ small businesses have used FreshBooks across 160+ countries
Save up to 553 hours per year and $7,000 in billable hours
Purpose-built for freelancers and service-based small businesses (not general accounting)
100+ app integrations in the FreshBooks AppStore
Easy Switch assisted migration from other accounting systems

praised: 'FreshBooks has really helped me to be more efficient throughout the year so that tax time…it's less stressful' — Damona Hoffman
Award-winning customer support recognized by PCMag (4.5 Excellent)
Ease of use for non-accountants — freelancer-friendly interface
complaints: Historical HN discussion 'Using FreshBooks for your web application's billing' surfaced friction with SaaS billing use cases
Self-hosted alternatives to FreshBooks/Basecamp/Trello indicate demand for lower-cost open-source options

free_tier.limits: 30-day free trial only; no permanent free tier

tiers.name: Lite
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 5 billable clients, invoicing, expense tracking, estimates, tax reports

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 50 clients, proposals, retainers, accountant access, receipt scanning, double-entry accounting

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited clients, bill line-item scanning, project profitability, customized email templates

tiers.name: Select
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom pricing: lower CC fees, capped ACH fees, dedicated phone support, Easy Switch, 2 team seats, white-label

pricing.notes: Currently running 90% off for 6 months promo (Lite $2.30, Plus $4.30, Premium $7.00). Add-ons: Team Members $11/mo per user, Advanced Payments $20/mo (included in Select), FreshBooks Payroll $40/mo + $6/mo per user. 30-day money-back guarantee. Client-count caps (5/50/unlimited) drive tier upgrades rather than seat counts.
